title: Support resource conservation practices
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support resource conservation practices demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare materials, tools and equipment for resource conservation

pcs.text: Identify, check and prepare materials, tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, check and prepare materials, tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, check and prepare materials, tools and equipment according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Adopt work practices to maximise productivity and time efficiency and minimise waste and resources

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adopt work practices to maximise productivity and time efficiency and minimise waste and resources.

pcs.text: Follow instructions and directions provided by supervisor and seek clarification when unsure

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow instructions and directions provided by supervisor and seek clarification when unsure.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare materials, tools and equipment for resource conservation

elements.title: Undertake resource conservation practices as directed

pcs.text: Carry out resource conservation work according to workplace health and safety, and environmental procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report problems or difficulties in completing work to required standards or timelines to supervisor.
